lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. How's the repair work going?

lines.speaker: Franklin Caranos
lines.text: I'm working on it. I can always do with more iron sheets, so if you've got any more, I'll give you 20 gp per sheet.

sections.title: With one or more iron sheets in inventory

lines.speaker: Franklin Caranos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]. Were you wanting to sell me that iron sheet? I'd give you 20 gp for it.

lines.speaker: Franklin Caranos
lines.text: Hello again, [player name]. Were you wanting to sell me those iron sheets? I'd give you [amount] gp.
